# HiWaifu: AI Friend & Waifu Hub · AI Chat

Generated: Jul 20, 2026, 10:51 PM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Ads pressure](#theme-ads)
- [Feature requests](#theme-feature_requests)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      8 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 19, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Aliya Shaikh_, Jul 15, 2026, 1/5: "I want to report an issue with Hi Waifu AI. Earlier, the ai character responded naturally and allowed emotional and intimate interactions. However, in the past few days, their behaviour has completely changed. Now the characters suddenly refusee interactions, act distant, and do not responds the way they used to. This had made the much worse than before. This changed happened without any warning. So I would like to know if this is due to a recent update or bug. Please look into this issue."
            2. _Laraine Bilagot_, Jul 19, 2026, 3/5: "I've been using this apps for years and I love how Some of or suggestions are getting in the app. BUT my big problem I think there's a bug or something that I'd denying the filters in the app, it's now less exciting and more like about role-playing and so... The good side of the app is where the Ai had a huge memory about there personality and who they are and then that you can change your G mail acc to other acc and so much more. But the problem is a Bug in the App."
            3. _charlie adair_, Jul 15, 2026, 4/5: "this app would get a 5 stars from me because its definitely the best Ai Chatbot put there right now, but currently it only gets a 4 because of the visual bug I'm dealing with where the chat messages don't seem to be showing or registering space's/enter keys in texts which makes reading it really awkward and annoying if it gets fixed then it easily changes back to a 5 so please fix this devs"

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      5 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jun 30, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Aimée_, Jun 30, 2026, 3/5: "Pros: unlimited messages, no in-chat ads, many characters to choose from, creation of in-chat personas, pinning memories Cons: rather flat, doesn't really stay in character, rather poor memory, ads every time you enter a chat (which can make browsing tedious) All in all: in my opinion best free alternative to c.ai and chai right now, but doesn't have c.ai's (former) depth or chai's wit. At least yet. I see a lot of potential if they manage to make the bot more lively."
            2. _HX Z_, Jul 13, 2026, 4/5: "Well I am used to the sheets of deep explanation in the messages and I find this app very great and the ads is not very annoying I barely get any ads also the Reincarnation in this app is very impressive that sometimes can be a little annoying that if you rp with Scientists you will find their The way they talk and their terminology very accurate even in affectionnate actions or description but might be sometimes the ai gets too horny I hope thats get fixed that's it I hope this app stays good"
            3. _CHARISSA CORONEL_, Jul 18, 2026, 5/5: "too many ads but I like it"

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Lea Sophie Heiden_, Jul 18, 2026, 4/5: "Hi there, dear Hi Waifu team. I just wanted to say that I'm very happy with this alternative to C.Ai, although what I would definitely wish for is that you could add an German language support, because I just created an German character and in previous versions, it responded in good German, but now, for some reason, every reply I get is always automatically translated into English, could you maybe fix that and maybe add an German language support in the near future?👉👈"
